name: AI Assistant
description: Configure AI providers and models for the assistant.

management.title: AI Assistant settings
management.description: Configure the AI providers and models used by the assistant.
management.loadError: Failed to load AI Assistant settings

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.helper: The API root used for this provider. Include the API version path when the provider requires it.

activeProvider.label: Configure provider
activeProvider.description: Choose which provider you want to edit right now.

deepseek.title: DeepSeek

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.helper: Leave blank to keep the current key.
apiKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current key. Enter a new key to replace it.

model.label: Model
model.helper: Use deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash for the newest V4 release; deepseek-reasoner is available for reasoning-heavy tasks.

deepseek.apiKeyRequired: A DeepSeek API key is required

claude.title: Claude (Anthropic)

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.helper: Leave blank to keep the current key.
apiKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current key. Enter a new key to replace it.

model.label: Model
model.helper: Claude Fable 5 is the latest flagship; Mythos 5, Opus 4.8, and Sonnet 4.6 are strong alternatives.

claude.apiKeyRequired: A Claude API key is required

adminApiKey.label: Admin API key
adminApiKey.helper: Optional. Required for live usage and cost sync.
adminApiKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current admin key.

openai.title: OpenAI

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.helper: Leave blank to keep the current key.
apiKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current key. Enter a new key to replace it.

model.label: Model
model.helper: GPT-5.5 is the newest general-purpose model; GPT-5.4, GPT-5.2, and GPT-5.1 are good alternatives.

openai.apiKeyRequired: An OpenAI API key is required

grok.title: Grok (xAI)

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.helper: Leave blank to keep the current key.
apiKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current key. Enter a new key to replace it.

model.label: Model
model.helper: Grok 4.3 is the newest general-purpose model; Build 0.1 and Grok 3 are valid alternatives.

grok.apiKeyRequired: An xAI API key is required

managementKey.label: Management key
managementKey.helper: Optional. Required for live billing balance sync.
managementKey.helperExisting: Leave blank to keep the current management key.

teamId.label: Team ID
teamId.helper: Required for xAI billing balance and usage sync.

defaultProvider.label: Default AI provider
defaultProvider.description: Choose which provider handles assistant requests by default.

billingStatus.title: Billing status
billingStatus.description: Shows which providers can report live balance or synced usage.

deepseek.title: DeepSeek balance
deepseek.helper: Live balance is available when a DeepSeek API key is saved.

claude.title: Claude usage sync
claude.helper: Admin API key enables monthly usage and cost sync.

openai.title: OpenAI fallback
openai.helper: OpenAI has no public balance API here, so usage remains app-backed.

grok.title: Grok balance
grok.helper: Management key and team ID are required for live balance sync.

promptTemplates.title: Prompt Templates
promptTemplates.description: Build reusable prompt templates. Pass an ID or name with input values to run them anywhere.
promptTemplates.empty: No templates yet. Create your first prompt template.
promptTemplates.templateCount: {count, plural, =0 {No templates} one {# template} other {# templates}}
promptTemplates.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The template and all its inputs and outputs will be permanently removed.

form.name: Name
form.maxTokensHint: Leave blank to use the provider default
form.systemPromptHelper: Instructions for the AI. Leave blank to use the default assistant behavior.
form.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful assistant that…
form.userPromptHelper: Use '{{variable}}' syntax for dynamic values. Example: Summarize this text: '{{text}}'
form.noInputs: No inputs defined. Use '{{variable}}' in the prompt and add an input for each one.
form.noOutputs: No outputs defined (optional metadata about the AI response).

run.noInputs: This template has no inputs. Click Run to execute it.
